label: L3 Medium (paper-safe baseline)
description: Baseline trajectory priors as committed in scenarios/california/scenario.json and scenarios/ohio/scenario.json. Reproduces the MEDIUM L3 component of the paper-safe Monte Carlo ensemble. For US Average, the centred triangulars in scenarios/us_average/scenario.json are honored; this preset only names the shape and width.

notes.us_average_fallback: if the region is us_average, the scenario file's cav/sti/total_car_increase centres are used unchanged; only sigmas/supports mirror CA/OH defaults.
